mapper.select:
select id, code, name, applicable_realm_type_id as applicableRealmTypeId, auth_methods as authMethodsText, default_page as defaultPage, status, create_time as createTime from login_page
deleted = false
and `name` like concat('%', #{request.name}, '%')
and `code` like concat('%', #{request.code}, '%')
and applicable_realm_type_id = #{request.applicableRealmTypeId}
and status = #{request.status}
order by create_time desc
select id, code, name, default_page as defaultPage from login_page where deleted = 0 and status = 1 order by default_page desc, create_time desc
